properties.name: Littlebridge Farm Fresh Ltd
properties.description: A local farm favourite known for fresh produce and a friendly atmosphere.

properties.name: Grangewater open farm
properties.description: A great open farm experience where kids can get up close with various farm animals.

properties.name: Tannaghmore Gardens & Animal Farm
properties.description: Features rare breeds of farm animals, beautiful gardens, and a large playpark.

properties.name: Fermanagh Fun Farm
properties.description: A fantastic day out with animal feeding, indoor play, and tractor rides.

properties.name: Fort Evergreen Warrenpoint
properties.description: Combines an animal farm with a brilliant fort-themed play area and petting zoo.

properties.name: Mountpanther Farm Park
properties.description: Features exotic animals, a huge soft play area, and outdoor bouncy pillows.

properties.name: WWT Castle Espie
properties.description: Explore the wetlands, feed the ducks, and enjoy the stunning views of Strangford Lough.

properties.name: Rosepark Farm
properties.description: A family-run farm with a great inland beach, petting area, and beautiful walkways.

properties.name: Streamvale Farm
properties.description: A classic dairy farm experience with puppy cuddling, bottle feeding, and barrel rides.

properties.name: Glenpark Estate
properties.description: A beautiful estate featuring rare breed animals and a lovely woodland setting.

properties.name: Portrush Strand
properties.description: The classic NI seaside destination! Famous for its two main beaches (East and West Strand) and plenty of amusements nearby.

properties.name: The Arcadia Cafe
properties.description: A landmark spot in Portrush. Perfect for a coffee with a view while the kids explore the rocky shoreline and paddling areas.

properties.name: Seapark Bay Beach
properties.description: Located in Holywood, this sandy beach has a brilliant, large playpark and plenty of green space for a family picnic.

properties.name: Crawfordsburn Country Park
properties.description: Two beautiful beaches tucked away in a country park with forest walks, a waterfall, and a modern visitor centre.

properties.name: Newcastle Beach
properties.description: A stunning beach where the 'Mountains of Mourne sweep down to the sea.' Steps away from the promenade and ice cream shops.

properties.name: Downhill Strand
properties.description: One of NI's longest beaches, famous for the Mussenden Temple perched on the cliff above. You can even drive your car onto this beach!

properties.name: Inflatable World Cookstown
properties.description: A massive indoor arena filled with bouncy castles, slides, and obstacles. Perfect for burning off energy on a rainy day.

properties.name: Wee Adventurers Play Hub
properties.description: A focused play centre in Cookstown designed for younger children to explore and learn through play.

properties.name: Happy Dayz
properties.description: A popular soft play centre with a large multi-level frame, slides, and a dedicated toddler area.

properties.name: Duff Land
properties.description: A family-run adventure farm and indoor play area featuring animals and plenty of space to run around.

properties.name: Mini Minds Play Cafe
properties.description: A unique role-play cafe where children can use their imaginations while parents enjoy a coffee nearby.

properties.name: High Rise Lisburn
properties.description: A high-spec adventure centre with climbing walls and a huge multi-story soft play area.

properties.name: Little Izzie's Play Cafe
properties.description: A cozy play cafe perfect for younger children, featuring role-play areas and great snacks for the adults.

properties.name: Nature and Nurture
properties.description: A beautiful sensory-focused play centre designed to be a calm and engaging environment for little ones.

properties.name: Andersonstown Leisure Centre
properties.description: Home to 'Surf Belfast' and a fantastic indoor water park with slides that the whole family will love.

properties.name: Little Play Studio
properties.description: A creative and imaginative role-play studio where kids can pretend to be doctors, chefs, or shopkeepers.

properties.name: Roar and Explore
properties.description: Belfast City Zoo's own indoor soft play. A fun, animal-themed adventure for kids to enjoy after seeing the zoo.

properties.name: W5
properties.description: Ireland's award-winning science and discovery centre. Interactive exhibits for kids of all ages.

properties.name: Dobbies Garden Centre Lisburn
properties.description: Includes a great little indoor soft play area and a family-friendly restaurant perfect for a quick stop.

properties.name: Honeybees Playtown
properties.description: An imaginative role-play centre where children can learn and explore in a miniature version of a real town.

properties.name: The Wee Village
properties.description: A charming role-play village located in Antrim, designed specifically for toddlers and young children.

properties.name: Global Adventure Play LTD
properties.description: A massive soft play and laser tag arena with multi-story frames and exciting slides.

properties.name: The Imaginarium
properties.description: A sensory-rich environment for children to explore through art, light, and creative play.

properties.name: Twig & Tumble
properties.description: A modern and clean soft play area in Enniskillen with a lovely cafe for parents.

properties.name: Playaway
properties.description: A well-established soft play centre in Portadown with frames for different age groups.

properties.name: The Hive
properties.description: An indoor adventure centre featuring soft play, sensory areas, and role-play zones.

properties.name: The Sensory Xperience
properties.description: A dedicated sensory space designed for children with additional needs, offering a safe and stimulating environment.

properties.name: Airtastic Craigavon
properties.description: A massive entertainment hub featuring a trampoline park, ninja course, and soft play area.

properties.name: The Jet Centre
properties.description: The ultimate rainy day spot: bowling, cinema, mini-golf, and a huge 'Alley Cats' soft play area.

properties.name: R Crawford & Co
properties.description: A family-friendly hardware and lifestyle store that surprisingly houses a lovely little soft play and cafe upstairs!

properties.name: The Derry Walls
properties.description: Walk the historic 17th-century walls! A great way to see the city from above with plenty of cannons for the kids to spot.

properties.name: National Trust - Springhill
properties.description: A pretty 17th-century house with a famous costume collection and lovely woodland walks. Keep an eye out for the friendly ghost!

properties.name: Mussenden Temple
properties.description: Perched right on the cliff edge! Explore the ruins of Downhill House and run through the wide open gardens.

properties.name: National Trust - The Argory
properties.description: Atmospheric wooded estate beside the River Blackwater. Features a great adventure playground and a quirky cafe.

properties.name: National Trust - Castle Coole
properties.description: A grand mansion on the edge of Enniskillen. Perfect for a family stroll around the lake and through the wooded trails.

properties.name: Enniskillen Castle
properties.description: Explore the castle towers and the Inniskillings Museum. Great interactive displays for kids interested in history.

properties.name: Castle Archdale
properties.description: A lakeside paradise! WWII history meets adventure with forest walks, a butterfly garden, and boat hire.

properties.name: Florence Court House
properties.description: Famous for the Florence Court Yew. There's a great walled garden, a sawmill, and miles of forest paths to explore.

properties.name: National Trust - Rowallane Garden
properties.description: A mix of formal and wild gardens. The 'Natural Play' area and hidden trails are brilliant for little explorers.

properties.name: Seaforde Gardens & Tropical Butterfly House
properties.description: Walk through a jungle filled with free-flying butterflies! Also features a maze and a great garden centre cafe.

properties.name: Montalto Estate
properties.description: A must-visit! Home to an incredible award-winning adventure playground, trails, and a beautiful tea room.

properties.name: Glenarm Castle
properties.description: One of NI's oldest estates. The walled garden is stunning, and the Pizza Pavilion is a great family lunch spot.

properties.name: W5 Interactive
properties.description: Interactive science centre with hundreds of hands-on exhibits. A perfect rainy-day destination for all ages.

properties.name: An Creagán History
properties.description: A forest and river walk filled with local history. Great for a quiet family bike ride or a dander through the trees.

properties.name: Glenpark Estate Grounds
properties.description: Beautiful grounds featuring rare-breed animals, a farm shop, and lovely forest paths.

properties.name: Pomeroy Forest
properties.description: A magical forest park featuring the 'Renardine' fairy trail and a fantastic wooden play area for children.

properties.name: Grange Park Omagh
properties.description: A spacious urban park in Omagh with a modern playground and an outdoor gym for parents.

properties.name: Gortin Glen Forest Park
properties.description: A destination park with a massive multi-age playground, deer enclosures, and family mountain bike trails.

properties.name: An Creagán Trails
properties.description: Explore the wild bogland with forest trails and a river walk. Great for bikes and buggies.

properties.name: Round Lake
properties.description: A peaceful lakeside spot in Fivemiletown. Perfect for a walk around the water followed by a play in the park.

properties.name: Davagh Forest
properties.description: Home to the Dark Sky Observatory. Features wooded walks and world-class mountain biking trails.

properties.name: Dungannon Park
properties.description: A 70-acre park with a massive lake. It offers a great playground, tennis courts, and plenty of space for family picnics.

properties.name: Drum Manor Forest Park
properties.description: Famous for its vibrant gardens and manor ruins. The large playground is a hit with kids of all ages.

properties.name: Glenarm Castle Gardens Park
properties.description: Beautiful walled gardens with plenty of hidden corners for kids to discover. Check out the Pizza Pavilion!

properties.name: Ramore Head
properties.description: Dramatic coastal walks in Portrush. Great for exploring rock pools and watching the waves crash against the cliffs.

properties.name: Ormeau Park
properties.description: Belfast's oldest municipal park. Large playgrounds, eco-trails, and wide paths perfect for learning to cycle.

properties.name: V36 Adventure Play Area
properties.description: A massive, modern adventure park in Newtownabbey with climbing frames, zip wires, and a skate park.

properties.name: Wallace Park
properties.description: The 'Jewel of Lisburn'. Features a fantastic playground, a duck pond, and safe, flat walking paths.

properties.name: Cave Hill Country Park
properties.description: Home to Belfast Castle. The playground here is excellent, and the hike to McArt's Fort offers the best view in the city.

properties.name: People's Park Ballymena
properties.description: A lovely park in the heart of Ballymena with a lake, large playground, and well-maintained flower gardens.

properties.name: Antrim Lough Shore Park Playpark
properties.description: Situated on the banks of Lough Neagh. A beautiful spot for a walk, with a great playground and cafe.

properties.name: Mo Mowlam Play Park
properties.description: Located within the Stormont Estate. This is one of the best inclusive playgrounds in NI, catering to all abilities.

properties.name: Seapark Bay Park
properties.description: Beach meets park! A large grassy area with a seaside playground and views across Belfast Lough.

properties.name: Hillsborough Forest Park
properties.description: Recently upgraded with a fantastic digital sculpture trail and a large, modern lakeside playground.

properties.name: Montalto Estate Play Park
properties.description: A multi-award-winning adventure playground designed to look like a treehouse. A must-visit destination.

properties.name: WWT Castle Espie Nature Play
properties.description: Feed the ducks and explore the wetlands. Great nature-based play areas and bird watching for kids.

properties.name: Kilbroney Park
properties.description: Home to the Narnia Trail! A beautiful park in Rostrevor with mountain views and a great playground.

properties.name: Delamont Country Park
properties.description: Features the longest miniature railway in Ireland and a massive adventure playground with views of the lough.

properties.name: Castlewellan Forest Park
properties.description: Home to the Peace Maze and a brilliant play area. Perfect for family walks around the lake.

properties.name: Tollymore Forest Park
properties.description: Famous for its stepping stones and forest trails. A great place for families to explore the 'real' Narnia.

properties.name: Castle Archdale Park
properties.description: Lakeside trails, WWII history, and a great playground. A Fermanagh favourite for sunny days.

properties.name: Round 'O' Park
properties.description: Enniskillen's main riverside park. Duck feeding, boat trips, and a well-equipped playground.

properties.name: Loughgall Country Park
properties.description: Set in a rural estate with a large lake, forest walks, and a quiet, safe play area.

properties.name: Maghery Country Park
properties.description: Located on the shores of Lough Neagh. Woodland walks and a pleasant playground in a quiet setting.

properties.name: Gosford Forest Park
properties.description: Incredible 'All Out Play' adventure playground with giant castles and zip lines. Great for older kids too.

properties.name: Peatlands Park
properties.description: Unique bogland park with a narrow-gauge railway and miles of walking trails through the woods.

properties.name: Scarva Park
properties.description: A lovely village park beside the canal. Famous for its tea rooms and the beautiful towpath walk.

properties.name: Edenvilla Park
properties.description: Home to the Secret Garden and a fantastic bird sanctuary. A quiet, peaceful park with a good playground.

properties.name: Oxford Island
properties.description: Nature reserve on Lough Neagh. Great for bird watching, woodland walks, and a lakeside picnic.

properties.name: Slieve Gullion Forest Park
properties.description: Includes the 'Giant's Lair' adventure walk—a magical trail through the forest for little imaginations.

properties.name: Lurgan Park
properties.description: The second largest park in Ireland! Features a huge lake, miles of paths, and a great playground.

properties.name: Tannaghmore Gardens
properties.description: Farm animals, rare breeds, and a massive playground. A brilliant free day out for the whole family.

properties.name: Ballyarnett Country Park
properties.description: A spacious park in Derry with a focus on biodiversity and outdoor family fun.

properties.name: Limavady Play Park
properties.description: A high-quality, accessible playground in the heart of Limavady designed for all children.

properties.name: Diversity Park
properties.description: Located at Flowerfield Arts Centre. A fully inclusive play area with equipment for children of all abilities.

properties.name: Claudy Country Park
properties.description: Lovely riverside walks and forest trails in a quiet setting. Perfect for a family dander.

properties.name: Ness Country Park
properties.description: Home to the highest waterfall in NI! A stunning wooded park with dramatic walks and bridges.

properties.name: Ballyronan Marina
properties.description: A beautiful lough-side setting with a newly refurbished playground and forest 'wood-spirit' walk.

properties.name: Iniscarn Forest
properties.description: A hidden gem for forest walks and exploring the foothills of the Sperrins.

properties.name: The Lake Kilrea WaterPark
properties.description: Ireland's giant inflatable water park! Features massive slides, obstacles, and a 'total wipeout' style experience on the lake.

properties.name: Jungle NI
properties.description: One of the best adventure centres in NI. Offering paintball, zorbing, tree-top high ropes, and seasonal events like the Fright Night.

properties.name: Airtastic Craigavon Sports
properties.description: A huge indoor entertainment hub. Features a trampoline park, ninja course, laser tag, and bowling all under one roof.

properties.name: Life Adventure Centre
properties.description: Based in Castlewellan, offering mountain bike hire, kayaking, and canoeing on the lake. Great for active families.

properties.name: Let's Go Hydro
properties.description: A premier water sports park with a huge inflatable aqua park, cable wakeboarding, and luxury glamping pods.

properties.name: Castlewood Tree Top Adventure
properties.description: Climb, swing, and zip through the trees at Antrim Lough Shore. A brilliant challenge for brave little adventurers.

properties.name: Andersonstown Water Park
properties.description: Home to the 'Surf Belfast' indoor wave rider and a fantastic water park with three high-speed water slides.

properties.name: High Rise Lisburn Sports
properties.description: A vertical adventure centre featuring Clip 'n Climb walls, a massive soft play, and sensory rooms.

properties.name: Inflatable World Sports
properties.description: Indoor bouncy heaven! A huge warehouse filled with every type of inflatable slide and obstacle you can imagine.

properties.name: DJ's Golf Driving Range
properties.description: A family-friendly driving range in Cookstown. Great for a bit of competitive fun or introducing the kids to golf.

properties.name: Todds Leap Activity Centre
properties.description: Extreme adventure! Off-road trucking, the giant swing, zip lines, and clay pigeon shooting for older kids and adults.
